div1.entryFree: Cates, delicious food, dainties: though my c. be mean, take them in good part, Err. III, 1, 28. dainties are all c. Shr. II, 190. I had rather live with cheese and garlic than feed on c. H4A III, 1, 163. and see what c. you have, H6A II, 3, 79. these c. resist me, she but thought upon, Per. II, 3, 29.
